text.tspan: Ph.D. cryptographer turned automotive security engineer.
Built homomorphic encryption and SMPC cores at a Tokyo
privacy-preserving AI startup. Now at Bosch Group, securing
EU and US OEM vehicle programs against real-world threats.
· UNECE R155/R156 · TARA · CSMS work products
· Co-lead on selected EU and US OEM programs
· Built HE + SMPC core for DataArmor GateDB
· Key management and comms for ABE system
